name: Bounty Hunter
description: No job is too big; no fee is too big.

abilities.name: Big Game Hunter
abilities.description: Applies a debuff to certain top networth enemy heroes. Grants Gondar a kill gold bonus or an assist gold bonus upon killing the debuff-affected enemy hero. Kill Gold Factor: 1.15. Assist Gold Factor: 1.15.

abilities.name: Shuriken Toss
abilities.description: Hurls a deadly shuriken at an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing the target. While the shuriken may be small, Gondar's precise aim can cause critical damage. Cast Range: 375/425/475/525 (600). Damage: 100/170/240/310 (350/420/490/560). Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Duration: 0.35 (0.95). Bounce Search Radius: 1200. Attack Damage Bonus to Spell Damage Factor: (1). Cooldown: 5. Mana Cost: 75/80/85/90.

abilities.name: Jinada
abilities.description: Deals bonus damage and stealing some unreliable gold when off-cooldown. Cast Range: 150. Attack Damage Bonus: 70/105/140/175. Cooldown: 9/7/5/3 (0).

abilities.name: Shadow Walk
abilities.description: The attack breaking invisibility will stun the attacked enemy unit for a short duration. Fade Time: 1/0.75/0.5/0.25. Move Speed Bonus: 8%/12%/16%/20%. Invisibility Duration: 20/25/30/35. Damage Reduction: (30%). Stun Duration: 1/1.2/1.4/1.6. Cooldown: 18/17/16/15 (13/12/11/10). Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Friendly Shadow
abilities.description: Applies an invisibility buff based on Shadow Walk of the corresponding level. Has a slightly longer fade time duration for allied heroes. The attack breaking invisibility will stun the attacked enemy unit for a short duration. Cast Range: 650. Fade Time: 0.5. Cooldown: 13/12/11/10. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Track
abilities.description: Grants True Sight, applies an incoming damage amplification debuff, and information on how much gold the affected enemy unit is carrying. If the Tracked enemy unit dies, Gondar collects a bonus gold bounty. Track does not break Gondar's Shadow Walk upon cast. The debuff applied additionally grants shared vision to Gondar's allied units. Cast Range: 1000. Damage Amp: 8%/12%/16%. Debuff Duration: 25. Mana Cost: 60.
